title: geum franckii
intro: Geum franckii, also known as the Frans Geum or Yellow Avens, is a perennial plant species belonging to the rose family (Rosaceae). The plant has been used in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antispasmodic properties. The health benefits of Geum franckii include its ability to reduce inflammation and alleviate symptoms of digestive disorders, such as irritable bowel syndrome. Geum franckii can be prepared in various herbal forms, including tea, tincture, and infusions, which can be used to treat a range of health issues.
